subject: Change inititilization of kafka
commit_message:
Change inititilization of kafka

extract settings file from docker and
put it in a config file.

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1101

Change-Id: I88fa04451fdfdec37722ba0019e72a972925c50b
Signed-off-by: Matthieu Cauffiez <matthieu.cauffiez@bell.ca>

Patch Set 3:

Mattheiu,

If you are interested in working on any of the DMaaP project, please discuss first in the DMaaP meetings, otherwise whatever the commits may impact the progress of whatever DMaaP commited for the Dublin

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

We can pass all the Kafka broker properties using env variables. So no need of overriding the server.properties in bootstrap script. Some of the changes in the commit are not required and some are conflicting with what DMaaP planned to deliver in Dublin. 

Please discuss any proposed changes in DMaaP weekly meeting ( Mon, Wed and Fri) to avoid any conflicts

Patch Set 3:

Please either fix the merge conflict or abandon this.
